# Vendored frontend assets

These files are intentionally vendored when they are generated by Mix packages
or cannot be managed directly by npm.

## heroicons

The `heroicons.js` Tailwind plugin is generated from the Mix `:heroicons`
dependency during asset setup. Keep the Mix dependency as the source of truth.

## npm-managed assets

daisyUI and topbar are regular npm dependencies in `assets/package.json`.
Renovate updates those versions and `assets/package-lock.json`; the app imports
them from `assets/node_modules` during the asset build.
